[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110100010 4
1 0110110001 5
2 1011011011 7
3 1000110100 4
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000000 a
6 0000000000 a
7 0000000000 a
